headline: Ford (F) Resets EV Plans After Sales Slump And Supplier Fire
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) is overhauling its electric vehicle strategy after a sharp decline in EV sales. The company is shifting focus toward smaller, more affordable EVs while maintaining emphasis on high-margin traditional models. Production has been disrupted by a fire at a supplier plant that affected F-Series deliveries. Ford Motor is a core player in global auto manufacturing, with a long history in trucks, SUVs, and commercial vehicles. Its latest EV reset comes as the industry works...
